description: Build raw points from imported channels and canonical file inventory with immutable key file_id_plus_row_index
Validate raw schema and ensure time_s is imported channel in seconds not assumed elapsed
Produce clean table as deterministic row preserving transform carrying M_emu_raw M_emu_clean M_emu_smooth
Populate cleaning diagnostics fields and points_changed traceability columns
Attach segment_id segment_type segment_source as annotation only not cleaning semantics
Compute derived channels strictly from clean inputs including optional time_rel_s and validity flags
Represent uncomputable derived values as NaN with reason codes and validity flags
Aggregate observables from derived by default with full provenance metadata
Permit direct clean based observables only when source_columns and aggregation_method explicitly document exception
Execute schema identity parity provenance and isolation gates and emit gate outcomes
Map failed gates to FULL_CANONICAL_DATA_PRODUCT and MT readiness fields per failure policy
